generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and a taxpayer, I've always believed in supporting our nation's strategic autonomy. But have you considered how over-reliance on foreign defense systems actually puts our families at risk? Just last year, a local factory that supplied critical components to our allies' defense systems shut down because of unfair trade practices. Our community lost 200 jobs, and our national security became a little less secure. It's time we invest in our own capabilities—not just for our economy, but for our safety. #SecureOurFuture #StrongerTogether
